name: qwen-webgpu-lora
description: Emberglass — in-browser Qwen2.5-3B on a custom WebGPU runtime with runtime-swappable LoRA adapters. BYO model.

scripts.test:correctness: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/validate_wgpu.js --outfile test/vwg_bundle.js && node test/run_vwg.mjs
scripts.test:lora: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/lora_validate.js --outfile test/lorav_bundle.js && node test/run_lorav.mjs
scripts.test:prefill: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/prefill_diff.js --outfile test/prefdiff_bundle.js && node test/run_prefdiff.mjs
scripts.test:sampling: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/sampling_wgpu.js --outfile test/sampling_bundle.js && node test/run_sampling.mjs
scripts.test:topk-argmax: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/topk_argmax_ties.js --outfile test/topk_argmax_ties_bundle.js && node test/run_topk_argmax_ties.mjs
scripts.bench:wgpu: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/benchmark_wgpu.js --outfile test/bench_bundle.js && node test/run_bench.mjs
scripts.test:deep-kernels: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/deep_kernel_diff.js --outfile test/deepkernels_bundle.js && node test/run_deepkernels.mjs
scripts.test:backward: node esbuild.config.mjs --entry test/backward_validate.js --outfile test/backward_bundle.js && node test/run_backward_validate.mjs
